LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBigSymbolMultiplier1: During any spin, big symbols in the size of 2x2 and 3x3 may appear on the reels with a multiplier value on top of the symbol.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBigSymbolMultiplier2: Big symbols in the size of 2x2 will have a multiplier value ranged from x3 to x5.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBigSymbolMultiplier3: Big symbols in the size of 3x3 will have a multiplier value ranged from x5 to x10.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBigSymbolMultiplier4: If any big symbol is involved in a win, the multiplier value on that big symbol will be collected as the win multiplier after the winning symbols have been destroyed.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBigSymbolMultiplier5: During any round, all wins are multiplied by the win multiplier shown on top of the reels.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: If any big symbol is involved in a win, the multiplier value on that big symbol will be collected as the win multiplier after the winning symbols have been destroyed.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Some symbols may occupy 2x1, 2x2 and 3x3 of symbol spaces and each of these symbols will represent as 1 symbol during payout calculations.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: Wild symbols appear on reels 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6 only.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
LegendOfPerseusPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

LegendOfPerseusRules.GeneralRules1: Legend of Perseus is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot featuring big symbols with multipliers.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{15625} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{15625} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

LegendOfPerseusRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
